scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) { try { fs.rmSync(f); } catch {} } const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/buxoro-maktabi run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/buxoro-maktabi run typecheck
